---
name: Design partner inquiry
about: Teams with production OLTP workloads interested in early access and evidence exchange
title: "[DESIGN-PARTNER] "
labels: design-partner
assignees: ''
---

## About your workload

<!-- Describe your use case without sharing confidential details. -->

- **Workload type:** (e.g. billing, ERP, audit trail, time-series with point-in-time queries, …)
- **Approximate scale:** (connections, TPS, data volume — rough order of magnitude is fine)
- **Current database:** (PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle, …)
- **Deployment model:** bare metal / VM / container orchestrator

## Why AngaraBase

<!-- What property — fail-closed admission, UNDO-log MVCC, ARIES recovery, something else — is most relevant to your situation? -->

## What you need from the partnership

<!-- Early binaries, dedicated engineering contact, co-design of a specific feature, etc. -->

## What you can offer in exchange

<!-- Usage data, soak-test results, public case study, feedback on specific RFC proposals, etc. -->

## Timeline

<!-- When would you want to start? Any upcoming deadlines? -->

---

*Design partner capacity is limited to 5 active teams per release cycle.
See [angarabase.dev → Design Partner Program](https://angarabase.dev/community/design-partner.html) for the full program description.*
